2605.06597.title: UniSD: Towards a Unified Self-Distillation Framework for Large Language Models
2605.06597.paper_summary: Self-distillation (SD) offers a promising path for adapting large language models (LLMs) without relying on stronger external teachers. However, SD in autoregressive LLMs remains challenging because self-generated trajectories are free-form, correctness is task-dependent, and plausible rationales can still provide unstable or unreliable supervision. Existing methods mainly examine isolated design choices, leaving their effectiveness, roles, and interactions unclear. In this paper, we propose UniSD, a unified framework to systematically study self-distillation. UniSD integrates complementary mechanisms that address supervision reliability, representation alignment, and training stability, including multi-teacher agreement, EMA teacher stabilization, token-level contrastive learning, feature matching, and divergence clipping. Across six benchmarks and six models from three model families, UniSD reveals when self-distillation improves over static imitation, which components drive the gains, and how these components interact across tasks. Guided by these insights, we construct UniSDfull, an integrated pipeline that combines complementary components and achieves the strongest overall performance, improving over the base model by +5.4 points and the strongest baseline by +2.8 points. Extensive evaluation highlights self-distillation as a practical and steerable approach for efficient LLM adaptation without stronger external teachers.
2605.06597.paper_summary_zh: 自我蒸餾（SD）為適應大型語言模型（LLMs）提供了一條有前景的途徑，而無需依賴更強的外部教師。<lb/>然而，在自回歸LLMs中進行SD仍然具有挑戰性，因為自生成的軌跡是自由形式的，正確性依賴於任務，而合理的推理仍然可能提供不穩定或不可靠的監督。<lb/>現有的方法主要檢查孤立的設計選擇，導致其有效性、角色和相互作用不明確。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了UniSD，一個統一的框架，用於系統性研究自我蒸餾。<lb/>UniSD整合了互補機制，以解決監督可靠性、表示對齊和訓練穩定性，包括多教師一致性、EMA教師穩定化、標記級對比學習、特徵匹配和發散剪裁。<lb/>在來自三個模型家族的六個基準和六個模型中，UniSD揭示了自我蒸餾何時優於靜態模仿、哪些組件推動了增益，以及這些組件如何在任務之間相互作用。<lb/>在這些見解的指導下，我們構建了UniSDfull，一個集成管道，結合了互補組件，實現了最強的整體性能，較基礎模型提高了+5.4分，較最強基線提高了+2.8分。<lb/>廣泛的評估突顯了自我蒸餾作為一種實用且可引導的方法，能夠在不依賴更強外部教師的情況下高效適應LLM。
2605.06597.author: Yiqiao Jin et.al.
2605.06597.authors: Yiqiao Jin, Yiyang Wang, Lucheng Fu, Yijia Xiao, Yinyi Luo, Haoxin Liu, B. Aditya Prakash, Josiah Hester, Jindong Wang, Srijan Kumar
